title: Super funds rebound as global markets recover through April

summary: Superannuation funds in Australia saw a recovery in April as global markets improved, helping to boost investment returns for many funds. This rebound comes after a challenging period for financial markets earlier in the year.
heading: Superannuation and Investments
key_points: Super funds improved due to global market recovery.
April marked a positive turnaround for investments.
Funds had faced difficulties earlier in the year.
ticker_line: Super funds bounce back with market recovery
